data.title: Galaxy's Michael Novogratz Optimistic for Passage of Crypto Clarity Bill
data.description:
Novogratz doesn't believe crypto legislation needs to be perfect to move forward.

data.title: ZachXBT: The latest XMR rally was linked to a wallet exploit laundering
data.description:
XMR fell 20% from its peak, after on-chain researcher ZachXBT linked the recent pump to a single wallet exploit. An attacker stole $282M in BTC and LTC from a single hardware wallet, laundering the funds through XMR.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zachxbt-the-latest-xmr-rally-was-linked-to-a-wallet-exploit-laundering/

data.title: U.S. States Accelerate Bitcoin Treasury Plans as West Virginia and Florida Move Ahead
data.description:
U. S. states are pressing forward with Bitcoin-focused treasury strategies, even as federal crypto legislation remains stalled in Washington. Over the past week, West Virginia and Florida have taken concrete legislative steps that underscore a growing state-level push to integrate Bitcoin and digital assets into public finance
source: https://www.ethnews.com/u-s-states-accelerate-bitcoin-treasury-plans-as-west-virginia-and-florida-move-ahead/

data.title: Slips Completes $3.5M Seed Round Led by Major Investors
data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/news/slips-35m-seed-funding-investors/

data.title: Grant Cardone pushes crypto real estate hybrid amid Trump house shakeup plans
data.description:
Grant Cardone is pushing a new way to invest that combines real estate and crypto coins. This is happening while US President Donald Trump is pushing plans that might change the housing market by making it more affordable and increasing the supply. He claims that it is the perfect time to blend cash flow with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/grant-cardone-pushes-crypto-real-estate-hybrid-amid-trump-house-shakeup-plans/

data.title: XRP ETFs Hit $1.71B as Price Lags Behind — Here Is Whether $3 Is Still in Play
data.description:
The total value of XRP exchange-traded funds (ETFs) surged to an impressive $1.71 billion, even as the cryptocurrency's price struggles to keep up and remains relatively stagnant. In light of these developments, many investors and analysts are left wondering whether the potential for XRP to reach a price point of $3 is still a viable possibility in the coming weeks and months.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-etfs-hit-1-71b-as-price-lags-behind-here-is-whether-3-is-still-in-play/

data.title: Monero hit an all-time high earlier this week, and crypto sleuth ZachXBT thinks he knows why
data.description:
ZachXBT said that funds stolen during a social engineering hack were swapped to Monero, helping to push the asset to new highs.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/386014/monero-hit-all-time-high-this-week-crypto-sleuth-zachxbt-thinks-he-knows-why?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
